name: Khvorost ( Fried Sugar Circles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a medium bowl.
2. Add egg, water, vodka, and vanilla to the dry ingredients and mix well until a dough forms.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
4. Cover and let rest for 15 minutes.
5. Roll the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
6. Cut into strips.
7. Cut a small lengthwise slit near one end of each strip.
8. Twist the opposite end of the strip through the opening, handling gently, to form a loop.
9. Heat oil in a saucepan or deep fryer to 350°F (175°C).
10. Fry the loops in batches until golden brown.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Sprinkle generously with cinnamon sugar.
13. Serve immediately and accompany with Apricot sauce for dipping.
